__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: tensile strength σ_t plus commercial cost per kg for an algae-derived PHA (polyhydroxyalkanoate) bioplastic via fermentation route

operating_conditions.specimen_type: injection-molded dogbone per ASTM D638 Type I
operating_conditions.cost_basis: FOB plant gate, 2024-2025 commercial pilot pricing

model_caveat: Universal FFs are atomistic — they predict polymer backbone + side-chain energetics + chain-folding geometry, NOT bulk tensile strength (a semi-crystalline + processing-history dependent property). Tensile σ_t is set by crystallinity fraction + amorphous-tie-chain density + molding history. The 35 MPa + $4/kg values here are a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: Algenesis (Pyratel) algae-PHA injection-molded specimens + Newlight AirCarbon commercial pricing 2024.
proxy_source: Algenesis Materials 2024 Pyratel TPU + PHA technical brief (algae-derived bioplastic σ_t 30-40 MPa, pilot cost $3.5-5/kg); Newlight Technologies AirCarbon 2024 commercial PHA pricing ($4-6/kg, methane-feedstock cousin chemistry); Danimer Scientific Nodax PHA 2023 datasheet (PHB-co-PHV σ_t = 25-35 MPa); NatureWorks Ingeo PLA 2024 ($2.5-3/kg, comparator bioplastic baseline)
falsifier_text: tensile σ < 30 MPa OR commercial cost > $5/kg → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: algae-PHA marine-biodegradable claim UNVERIFIED preserved verbatim per §3.16 + `biodegradable-plastics/biodegradable-plastics.md` + NatureWorks / Danimer vendor authority
algae feedstock production cost at scale UNVERIFIED (pond + harvest energy not in $/kg ledger)
PHA processing window narrow — degradation onset at ~ 160 °C HARD_WALL on injection-molding cycle time
competing PLA / PE petrochemical baseline $1-2/kg (raw resin) — PHA is a 2-4× cost-premium bioplastic, UNVERIFIED at commodity-scale cost parity
ASTM D6691 marine + D5511 industrial-compost certification per Danimer / NatureWorks lab only — field validation pending
honesty_caveats: Both falsifier branches PASS at the proxy vendor + paper values. PASS does NOT close the candidate — the marine-PHA UNVERIFIED marker (per `biodegradable-plastics/biodegradable-plastics.md` + §3.16) stays in place; pilot cost $4/kg is pilot scale only, commodity parity UNVERIFIED. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Vendor datasheet + commercial-pricing values per Algenesis / Newlight / Danimer public literature; peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
